item.title: Extract require_numeric_arg() helper — numeric validation duplicated for multiple flags
item.intent: Replace the 3+ copies of numeric argument validation (regex check, log error, return 1) with a single require_numeric_arg() helper function
steps: Identify all places that validate numeric CLI arguments with the same if/regex/error pattern
Extract require_numeric_arg() that takes flag name and value, validates, and errors
acceptanceCriteria: Only one function contains the numeric argument validation logic
